artPrompt: An ongoing scene of swelling corruption: a mutant mass of sludge-bloated vines pulses larger in the wide frame, fed by glowing green tendrils that snake outward toward scattered dice and coins littering the toxic ground, each pulse brightening its bioluminescent veins. Rusted pipes and a bruised stormy sky loom behind. One sickly light source throbs at its core, rust-red shadow around it, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: It Grows With Every Vote
text:
Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on target creature you control. (This is the engine. The whole table is the engine. They just don't know they're pulling the lever.)
At the beginning of your end step, if a creature you control has ten or more sludge counters on it, it deals 5 damage to each opponent. The town hears it before it sees it.
flavorText: Every coin flipped in Whateverville lands somewhere. Lately it lands in the water.
